/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Werror=format-security -Wextra -Winvalid-pch -fexceptions -Wall -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fomit-frame-pointer -ffast-math -fno-finite-math-only -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,deicsonze.so -o deicsonze.so CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/deicsonze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/deicsonzefilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/deicsonzegui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/deicsonzeplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/deicsonzepreset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/moc_deicsonzegui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/deicsonze.dir/qrc_deicsonze.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/muse-4.2/modules ../../awl/libmuse_awl.so ../libsimpleplugin/libmuse_simpler_plugingui.so ../libsynti/libmuse_synti.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a ../../al/libmuse_al.so ../libsimpleplugin/libmuse_simpler_plugin.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_cache_reader_module.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_list_module.so ../../libs/plugin/libmuse_plugin_scan_module.so ../../libs/xml/libmuse_xml_module.so -ldl ../../libs/mpevent/libmuse_mpevent_module.so ../../libs/evdata/libmuse_evdata_module.so ../../libs/memory/libmuse_memory_module.so ../../libs/sysex_helper/libmuse_sysex_helper_module.so /usr/lib/libQt5UiTools.a /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib//libQt5Widgets.so /usr/lib//libQt5Gui.so /usr/lib//libQt5Core.so /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libQt5Xml.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Svg.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
